message.content:
NO CARDS. The image shows a webpage with the following visible elements:  
- Top text: "PRO DESIGN TOOLS" (small, uppercase, dark gray)  
- Below that: "MODULE-05B" (small, uppercase, dark gray)  
- Main heading: "Pro Tools for T-Shirt Printers" (larger, with "Pro Tools for" in dark gray and "T-Shirt Printers" in orange)  
- Subheading: "Built for DTF/DTG printing, apparel design, and client mockups. All tools work 100% in your browser — no sign-up, no API keys." (medium gray, centered)  
- Section 1: "Print & DTF/DTG" (bold, dark gray) with subtext "Tools built for T-shirt printers" (smaller, gray) and "3 TOOLS" (light gray, right-aligned)  
- Section 2: "Design" (bold, dark gray) with subtext "Creative design power tools" (smaller, gray) and "3 TOOLS" (light gray, right-aligned)  
- Background: Light beige/cream color. No cards, icons, or buttons are visible—only text and section headers.
